caption: Respond to a property possession claim
heading: Payments or agreements since the claim was made
paragraph1: You will now be asked questions about any payments your client has made, or agreements they have entered into, since Treetop Housing made their claim.
paragraph2: This will help a judge understand:
paragraph3: The claimant will be able to see the answers you provide.
paragraph4: If your client has paid some or all of the money they owe, you should bring proof of this to the hearing.
bullet1: Whether any arrangements have already been made to pay off the money your client owes in rent payments (rent arrears)
bullet2: Whether your client has paid some or all of the money they owe
